---
title: "PlantUML"
---

PlantUML is the workhorse of software UML — sequence, class, activity,
state, and component diagrams from a text language that has accumulated
two decades of examples, which is precisely why LLMs are so fluent in
it. It has no JavaScript renderer, so livefigures renders it through a
[kroki](https://kroki.io/) endpoint (self-hostable for private diagrams;
network is needed only on cache misses). @fig-seq shows this extension's
own render flow as a sequence diagram. Click to zoom.

![Render flow as a sequence diagram](figures/sequence.puml){#fig-seq}

[view source: `sequence.puml`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/site/gallery/figures/sequence.puml){.source-link}
